title: La chica del gato
writer: Carlos Arniches, Aureliano Campa, Ramón Quadreny
actors: Josita Hernán, Juan Espantaleón, Fernando Fernán Gómez
plot: An orphan, taken in at the home of unscrupulous people who intend to use her in a shady business, flees with her cat and her canary. Accustomed by necessity, she enters a dressmaker's house with the intention of stealing, but the ...
